profiles.bio: I do best when plans are clear enough to trust, but not so rigid that they feel like homework. Walks, coffee, and straightforward check-ins make dating much easier for me.
profiles.whatDrainsMe: Long stretches of vague texting and plans that stay undefined.
profiles.whatINeedFromAPartner: Direct updates, a little patience, and someone who says what they mean.
profiles.summary: ADHD identity, direct communication, medium social energy, and looking for dating with intent.

profiles.bio: I like warm conversations that are specific, paced, and easy to trust. Quiet rooms, day dates, and people who follow through make it much easier for me to relax.
profiles.whatDrainsMe: Last-minute changes, noisy venues, and people who treat mixed signals like flirting.
profiles.whatINeedFromAPartner: Clear intention, gentle pacing, and explicit communication around plans.

profiles.bio: I like honest conversations, a little momentum, and dates that feel alive without becoming chaotic. If we can name our energy and expectations clearly, I am very easy to be around.

profiles.whatINeedFromAPartner: Kindness, curiosity, and enough directness that nobody has to guess.

conversations.lastMessagePreview: A quiet coffee in Neukolln sounds easy on my side.

messages.body: Hi Jonas. I appreciated how clearly you described your pace and communication style.
Thank you. Clear beats charming for me too. A quiet coffee in Neukolln sounds easy on my side.

waitlistLeads.note: I want dating products that make expectations easier to talk about.
